inputs.label: Initial Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the material before the drying process.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the material before the drying process.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Materials vor dem Trocknungsprozess.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du matériau avant le processus de séchage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del material antes del proceso de secado.

inputs.label: Initial Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Moisture content of the material before drying as a percentage of total weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Moisture content of the material before drying as a percentage of total weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma öncesi malzemenin toplam ağırlığa göre nem içeriği yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feuchtigkeitsgehalt des Materials vor dem Trocknen als Prozentsatz des Gesamtgewichts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en humidité du matériau avant séchage en pourcentage du poids total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido de humedad del material antes del secado como porcentaje del peso total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: محتوى الرطوبة للمادة قبل التجفيف كنسبة مئوية من الوزن الإجمالي.

inputs.label: Final Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Desired moisture content after drying as a percentage of total weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired moisture content after drying as a percentage of total weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma sonrası istenen nem içeriği, toplam ağırlığa göre yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschter Feuchtigkeitsgehalt nach dem Trocknen als Prozentsatz des Gesamtgewichts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en humidité souhaitée après séchage en pourcentage du poids total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido de humedad deseado después del secado como porcentaje del peso total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: محتوى الرطوبة المطلوب بعد التجفيف كنسبة مئوية من الوزن الإجمالي.

inputs.label: Target Weight Loss
inputs.businessContext: Expected weight loss based on process specifications for comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected weight loss based on process specifications for comparison.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılaştırma için proses spesifikasyonlarına göre beklenen ağırlık kaybı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Gewichtsverlust basierend auf Prozessspezifikationen zum Vergleich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de poids attendue selon les spécifications du processus pour comparaison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdida de peso esperada según especificaciones del proceso para comparación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فقدان الوزن المتوقع بناءً على مواصفات العملية للمقارنة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
